title: Vertex Shader Stage & Clip Space
description: Covers vertex shader inputs and outputs, the mandatory position output in clip space, per-vertex data amplification, and the gl_VertexIndex / SV_VertexID built-in for procedural geometry. The vertex shader is the first programmable stage and its output defines the geometric foundation on which all subsequent stages operate. Students will implement a vertex shader that procedurally generates a sphere without a vertex buffer, apply a vertex displacement for water waves, and correctly pass interpolated data through varying / interpolant outputs to the pixel shader.
